title: White Noise
description: Experience Minecraft like never before - a glitchy, distorted world where reality breaks down into chromatic aberration and visual noise. This shader transforms your game into a surreal, corrupted dimension.
body:
Transform Minecraft into a glitchy, corrupted dimension. White Noise applies a chromatic aberration and visual distortion effect to your world, creating an aesthetic reminiscent of VHS corruption, broken signals, and digital artifacts.

Perfect for liminal space builds, experimental art projects, and unique screenshots. The shader creates wave-like interference patterns and RGB color splitting across all blocks while preserving texture details and lighting.
